news.title:
Bajaj Finance saw an NSE block trade of Rs. 49.15 crore for 534,217 shares.
The shares were executed at Rs. 920.10 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bajaj Finance shares surged 7%, reclaiming ₹900 after a two-month gap.
AUM grew 22% YoY to ₹5.1L Cr, but deposits fell 4% YoY; Macquarie rates 'Underperform'.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance shares surged 7%, reclaiming ₹900 after a two-month gap.
AUM grew 22% YoY to ₹5.1L Cr, but deposits fell 4% YoY; Macquarie rates 'Underperform'.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance's board to meet on April 29, 2026, to approve Q4 results and final dividend, if any.
Q3 FY26 saw 21% YoY NII growth, 22% AUM rise; stock rose 3% to Rs 850.85 on NSE.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance's board to meet on April 29, 2026, to approve Q4 results and final dividend, if any.
Q3 FY26 saw 21% YoY NII growth, 22% AUM rise; stock rose 3% to Rs 850.85 on NSE.

news.title:
Bajaj Alternate Investment Management secures Sebi approval for PMS licence.
The Bajaj Finserv arm aims to expand in listed equities via Portfolio Management Services.
news.summary:
Bajaj Alternate Investment Management secures Sebi approval for PMS licence.
The Bajaj Finserv arm aims to expand in listed equities via Portfolio Management Services.

news.title:
Macquarie retains Underperform on Bajaj Finance with ₹860 target, citing 22% FY26 AUM growth.
Concerns include weak deposit mix (~16%) and growth sustainability; risks involve loan, margin upside.
news.summary:
Macquarie retains Underperform on Bajaj Finance with ₹860 target, citing 22% FY26 AUM growth.
Concerns include weak deposit mix (~16%) and growth sustainability; risks involve loan, margin upside.

news.title:
Nifty faces key challenges from Iran war threats, Q4 updates, oil price rise.
Key stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Dabur.
news.summary:
Nifty faces key challenges from Iran war threats, Q4 updates, oil price rise.
Key stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Dabur.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv's alternative asset unit plans PE, real estate funds.
The unit aims to strengthen its team for upcoming launches.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv's alternative asset unit plans PE, real estate funds.
The unit aims to strengthen its team for upcoming launches.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance's customer base grew to 119.33M by Mar 2026 from 101.82M YoY.
Q4 FY26 loans rose 20.5% to 12.89M; AUM grew 22% YoY, deposits fell to ₹68,550 Cr.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance's customer base grew to 119.33M by Mar 2026 from 101.82M YoY.
Q4 FY26 loans rose 20.5% to 12.89M; AUM grew 22% YoY, deposits fell to ₹68,550 Cr.

news.title:
NowPurchase raises Rs 80 cr led by Bajaj Finserv to scale its AI platform, MetalCloud.
Funds will enhance R&D, scrap recycling, and expand offerings for metal manufacturers.
news.summary:
NowPurchase raises Rs 80 cr led by Bajaj Finserv to scale its AI platform, MetalCloud.
Funds will enhance R&D, scrap recycling, and expand offerings for metal manufacturers.

news.title:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.
news.summary:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance confirms interest and redemption payments for NCDs due by March 30-31, 2026, totaling ₹70.2 lakh.
Both interest and redemption payments were made on schedule, adhering to SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance confirms interest and redemption payments for NCDs due by March 30-31, 2026, totaling ₹70.2 lakh.
Both interest and redemption payments were made on schedule, adhering to SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv plans an AI-only fund, as per Chairman Sanjiv Bajaj.
The company intends to make direct investments aligned with this initiative.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv plans an AI-only fund, as per Chairman Sanjiv Bajaj.
The company intends to make direct investments aligned with this initiative.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv plans ₹400-₹450 Cr AI investments via a private equity fund and direct startups funding by FY27.
Bajaj Alts will manage AI, real estate, and public market funds as part of its alternatives strategy; shares fell 2.45% to ₹1,653.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv plans ₹400-₹450 Cr AI investments via a private equity fund and direct startups funding by FY27.
Bajaj Alts will manage AI, real estate, and public market funds as part of its alternatives strategy; shares fell 2.45% to ₹1,653.

news.title:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.
news.summary:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv trades at Rs 1,746.2, showing signs of trend reversal.
Stock finds support near 200-week EMA, a strong technical base.

news.title:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
